watchlist: Use my saved TradingView watchlist called X
methodology: Two separate frameworks: OTE Entry and HTF S&D Entry. Each has its own rules, confluences, and SL placement. Do not mix them.

timeframe_hierarchy.4H: Market timing and zone identification for both OTE and HTF S&D entries

indecisive.body_percent: 50% or less of total candle range (high to low)
indecisive.implication: Balance between supply and demand — orders being accumulated

decisive.body_percent: More than 50% of total candle range
decisive.implication: Institutional activity — one side consuming orders

explosive.body_percent: More than 70% of total candle range AND abnormally bigger than surrounding candles

location_analysis.method: Switch to Daily, read H1/H2/H3 and L1/L2/L3 from PxD Toolkit pivot table. Identify the most recent impulsive leg that contains current price — use the H and L of that SAME leg (they must come from the same move, not different legs). Position = (current price − leg low) / (leg high − leg low). Divide into 3 equal sections.

zones.equilibrium: 33% to 66% — NO TRADE regardless of direction

location_analysis.hard_rule: Equilibrium = no trade. This is a hard filter, not a suggestion.

direction_analysis.method: Read H1/H2/H3 (highs) and L1/L2/L3 (lows) labels directly from PxD Toolkit pivot table. Labels: HH = Higher High, LH = Lower High, HL = Higher Low, LL = Lower Low.

uptrend.note: Higher Highs not necessarily required — HL sequence is the key signal

downtrend.note: Lower Lows not necessarily required — LH sequence is the key signal

sideways.definition: Equal highs and equal lows — no clear sequence
sideways.rule: If no clear trend is recognisable, define it as sideways — no trade

anticipatory.definition: Entry before trend is fully confirmed using 3-4 previous pivots to anticipate next pivot
anticipatory.rule: Valid setup but lower conviction than confirmed trend — requires additional confluences

action_matrix.description: Location + Direction must be assessed before any trade. All must be met.

discount.downtrend: No Action — do not long in downtrend

premium.uptrend: No Action — do not short in uptrend

framework_1_OTE_entry.description: OTE entry using Fibonacci retracement of last impulsive leg. Separate from HTF S&D entry.
framework_1_OTE_entry.fibonacci_measurement: Wick to wick — swing low wick to swing high wick
framework_1_OTE_entry.sl_placement: 100% Fibonacci level + 10% of 4H ATR as buffer. For longs: swing low wick − (ATR × 0.10). For shorts: swing high wick + (ATR × 0.10).
framework_1_OTE_entry.tp1: 0% Fibonacci level — swing low for shorts, swing high for longs
framework_1_OTE_entry.tp2: Next opposing 4H S&D zone beyond TP1

confluence_checklist.description: Assess in this order before entry
confluence_checklist.step_1_location: Price must be in discount (longs) or premium (shorts) on Daily. Equilibrium = no trade.

step_2_liquidity_sweep.with_trend: Liquidity sweep before impulse = odds enhancer only, not mandatory
step_2_liquidity_sweep.counter_trend_or_anticipatory: Liquidity sweep before impulse = MANDATORY. No sweep = no trade.

confluence_checklist.step_3_bos_imbalance: Break of Structure with imbalance (FVG) confirming the impulsive leg. Calculate FVGs from OHLCV bars: bullish FVG = bar[i].low > bar[i-2].high (zone: bar[i-2].high to bar[i].low), bearish FVG = bar[i].high < bar[i-2].low (zone: bar[i].high to bar[i-2].low). Do NOT use pine boxes — they return 2dp precision only.
confluence_checklist.step_4_retracement: Price retraces to 70.5% of the impulsive leg for limit entry

setup_grades.absolute_best: Small Brother (4H S&D zone) located anywhere within 70.5%-88.6% OTE range + all 4 checklist items confirmed
setup_grades.A_plus: All 4 checklist items confirmed + FVG near entry (no Small Brother present)
setup_grades.A: With trend + BOS + OTE retracement (no sweep, no Small Brother, no FVG)
setup_grades.no_trade: Counter trend or anticipatory without liquidity sweep before impulse

big_brother_small_brother.big_brother: Daily S&D zone providing HTF directional context for the OTE entry
big_brother_small_brother.small_brother: 4H S&D zone that must fall anywhere within the 70.5%-88.6% OTE retracement range to qualify as confluence
big_brother_small_brother.rule: Small Brother alone without OTE is not a valid entry. Small Brother must be within the OTE zone to count.

framework_2_HTF_SD_entry.description: Standard HTF Supply and Demand zone entry. Separate from OTE entry.

zone_formation.structure: Every zone consists of three parts: Leg-In, Base, Leg-Out
zone_formation.identification_order: Step 1: Identify leg-out first. Step 2: Identify leg-in. Step 3: Identify the base between them.

leg_in.definition: Price action prior to the base
leg_in.candle_requirement: Must be made of a decisive or explosive candle
leg_in.direction: Can be a rally or a drop

base.definition: Consolidation between leg-in and leg-out — where unfilled orders sit

LTF_4H.option_1: Single explosive candle (body > 70% of range, abnormally bigger than surrounding candles)
LTF_4H.option_2: Decisive candle (abnormally bigger) followed by at least one more decisive or explosive candle

HTF_Daily.requirement: Decisive candle that is abnormally bigger than surrounding candles

demand.DBR: Drop-Base-Rally — U-shape. Price drops in, bases, rallies explosively out.
demand.RBR: Rally-Base-Rally — Price rallies in, bases, rallies explosively out.

supply.RBD: Rally-Base-Drop — Inverted U-shape. Price rallies in, bases, drops explosively out.
supply.DBD: Drop-Base-Drop — Price drops in, bases, drops explosively out.

RBR_demand.distal: Lowest wick of base and leg-out combined

DBD_supply.distal: Highest wick of base and leg-out combined

zone_qualifiers.description: ALL qualifiers must be met. This is a hard filter — not a scoring system. One fail = no trade.

LTF_4H.acceptable: Decisive candle (abnormally bigger) followed by at least one more decisive or explosive candle
LTF_4H.not_acceptable: Weak or gradual leg-out with multiple small candles — disqualified

HTF_Daily.acceptable: Decisive candle that is abnormally bigger than surrounding candles

2_base_duration.speed_bump_rule: Single candle base appearing mid-trend during strong momentum = speed bump = fake zone = disqualified. Look further left for the true origin zone.

3_freshness.detection: Read box color via data_get_pine_boxes(verbose=true) on Supply & Demand Pro. borderColor 1083317041 = Purple = Fresh. borderColor 1082555256 = Grey = Touched.

LTF_4H.great: Zone has never been tested — completely fresh (Purple)
LTF_4H.acceptable: Zone has been tested once (1st touch)
LTF_4H.not_acceptable: Zone tested twice or more — disqualified

HTF_Daily.rule: Can be tested approximately 25% into the zone based on preferred version and still qualify as fresh

4_originality.definition: Look LEFT of the zone — is this zone an original institutional imbalance or a reaction to another zone?
4_originality.original: Zone was NOT caused by a reaction to another zone to its left — passes originality
4_originality.non_original: Zone was caused by a bounce or reaction from another zone to its left — lower quality, flag and avoid

flip_zone.definition: New demand formed in area of original supply, or new supply formed in area of original demand
flip_zone.quality: Flip zones are usually original and tend to be stronger than regular original zones — one force clearly in control
flip_zone.priority: Highest priority zone type when also fresh and in correct location

5_profit_margin.description: Look RIGHT of the zone — is there enough room to target?
5_profit_margin.not_acceptable: R:R less than 1:2 — disqualified regardless of zone quality
5_profit_margin.rule: Check what is between entry and target — opposing zones or structure that block the path disqualify the profit margin

counter_trend_and_sideways.requirement: Steep or very steep arrival into zone — decisive or explosive candles approaching the zone with no opposing zones created during the move

6_arrival.with_trend: Do not look at arrival — trend momentum provides sufficient context

LOL_level_on_top_of_level.definition: Two zones on the same timeframe stacked close together
LOL_level_on_top_of_level.qualification_rule: The empty gap between the two zones must be SMALLER than the size of either zone — if gap is larger they are just two separate zones
LOL_level_on_top_of_level.entry: 100% position at proximal line of wider version of the lower zone
LOL_level_on_top_of_level.result: Highest R:R but lowest odds of getting filled — accept the fill risk for better R:R

risk_rules.daily_stop_rule: Stop trading after 2 consecutive losing trades

sl_by_entry_type.OTE_entry: 100% Fibonacci level + 10% of 4H ATR. Longs: swing low wick − (ATR × 0.10). Shorts: swing high wick + (ATR × 0.10).

indicator_tags.description: S&D Pro indicator plots zones automatically on TradingView. Claude Code can read these tags directly and must prioritize them over structural approximations.

tags.timeframe: Timeframe of the zone — Daily or 4H
tags.formation: Zone formation type — RBD, RBR, DBR, DBD
tags.F: Flip zone — new demand in area of original supply or new supply in area of original demand. NOT freshness.
tags.O: Original zone — not caused by a reaction to another zone to its left
tags.LoL: Level on Top of Level — two zones stacked with gap smaller than either zone

indicator_tags.freshness: Confirmed via box color from data_get_pine_boxes (verbose=true) on Supply & Demand Pro indicator. borderColor 1083317041 = Purple = Fresh (untouched). borderColor 1082555256 = Grey = Touched. borderColor null = historical zone, status unknown. No longer requires visual verification.
indicator_tags.fallback: If indicator returns no data, fall back to structural price analysis and flag as approximate.

notes: Two separate frameworks must never be mixed. OTE entry uses Fibonacci retracement (70.5-88.6%) of last impulsive leg wick to wick, with confluence checklist: location, liquidity sweep, BOS + imbalance, and 70.5% limit entry. Small Brother within OTE zone and FVG near entry are optional confluences that upgrade setup grade. HTF S&D entry uses zone qualifiers and action matrix, with Big Brother (Daily zone) and Small Brother (4H zone) as the primary confluence — Daily provides HTF context, 4H is the entry timeframe. Both frameworks require Location and Direction assessment on Daily first.
